data.body: #2 recall design: reuse sidecar.latest_review_result (already returns slim prior findings w/ norm_id) + the extra_context Pass-1 seam from #4. Plan: sidecar.prior_concerns(ticket_id) filters prior findings to priority>=near-bar (BLOCK+high ADVISORY, exclude DROPPED), capped; run_pass1 injects a per-chunk 'PRIOR-REVIEW CONCERNS (re-verify)' block scoped to each chunk's criteria (external context, NOT merged into findings -> independence preserved; Pass-2 unchanged = FP backstop); dedup fresh findings by norm_id. run_pass1 has ctx (ticket_id+repo_root) so loads there (ticket says orchestrator.py; real seam is pass1.py/production_batch_runner). Awaiting #2 review advisories.
